---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an endpoint or behavior for spritzer
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to test or model that spritzer does not support yet?

## Proposal

The endpoint or behavior you would like. If it maps to a Sprites endpoint, link
the relevant part of the Sprites API.

## Fidelity notes

What would spritzer need to model for this to be useful (state, checkpoints,
exec behavior)?

## Alternatives

Anything you have tried or considered.
